channel.title: The Gateway Index
channel.description: The living index of LLM gateways, proxies & routers — the infrastructure between apps and LLM providers.

item.title: BerriAI/litellm — momentum 87
item.description: Python SDK, Proxy Server (AI Gateway) to call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI (or native) format, with cost tracking, guardrails, loadbalancing and logging. [Bedrock, Azure, OpenAI, VertexAI, Cohere, Anthropic, Sagemaker, HuggingFace, VLLM, NVIDIA NIM]

item.title: QuantumNous/new-api — momentum 86
item.description: A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

item.title: Kong/kong — momentum 85
item.description: 🦍 The API and AI Gateway

item.title: tashfeenahmed/freellmapi — momentum 85
item.description: OpenAI-compatible proxy that stacks the free tiers of 16 LLM providers (~1.7B tokens/month) behind one /v1 endpoint — plus any custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Smart routing, automatic failover, encrypted keys. Personal experimentation only.

item.title: apache/apisix — momentum 81
item.description: The Cloud-Native API Gateway and AI Gateway

item.title: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute — momentum 80
item.description: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 231+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.

item.title: higress-group/higress — momentum 78
item.description: 🤖 AI Gateway | AI Native API Gateway

item.title: justlovemaki/AIClient2API — momentum 77
item.description: Self-hosted multi-protocol AI API proxy for Antigravity, Codex, Grok, Kiro, OpenAI, Claude, and custom providers. Supports OpenAI-compatible API, Claude API, Gemini protocol conversion, GPT, Grok Build, Claude Opus, Gemini Pro, Kimi, MiniMax, provider pools, smart routing, and automatic failover.

item.title: katanemo/plano — momentum 76
item.description: Plano is an AI-native proxy and data plane for agentic apps — with built-in orchestration, safety, observability, and smart LLM routing so you stay focused on your agents core logic.

item.title: BlockRunAI/ClawRouter — momentum 76
item.description: The agent-native LLM router for OpenClaw. 41+ models, <1ms routing, USDC payments on Base & Solana via x402.

item.title: maximhq/bifrost — momentum 76
item.description: Fastest enterprise AI gateway (50x faster than LiteLLM) with adaptive load balancer, cluster mode, guardrails, 1000+ models support & <100 µs overhead at 5k RPS.

item.title: seakee/CPA-Manager-Plus — momentum 76
item.description: Self-hosted AI gateway monitoring — track requests, cost, failures, quota, and account health for CPA / CLIProxyAPI and OpenAI-compatible gateways.

item.title: PawanOsman/OpenCursor — momentum 75
item.description: Open-source Cursor-like AI coding agent for VS Code — agentic chat, multi-provider LLMs (OpenAI, Ollama, llama.cpp), semantic search, and MCP support

item.title: kgateway-dev/kgateway — momentum 75
item.description: The Cloud-Native API Gateway and AI Gateway

item.title: vllm-project/semantic-router — momentum 75
item.description: System Level Intelligent Router for Mixture-of-Models at Cloud, Data Center and Edge

item.title: looplj/axonhub — momentum 75
item.description: ⚡️ Open-source AI Gateway — Use any SDK to call 100+ LLMs. Built-in failover, load balancing, cost control & end-to-end tracing.

item.title: dwgx/WindsurfAPI — momentum 75
item.description: Turn Windsurf / Devin Desktop's 100+ AI models (Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, Kimi, GLM, SWE) into OpenAI-, Anthropic- & Gemini-compatible APIs. Zero-dependency self-hosted reverse proxy for Claude Code, Cline & Cursor. 把 Windsurf/Devin 云端 100+ 模型变成三套兼容 API。

item.title: tensorzero/tensorzero — momentum 74
item.description: TensorZero is an open-source LLMOps platform that unifies an LLM gateway, observability, evaluation, optimization, and experimentation.

item.title: IBM/mcp-context-forge — momentum 74
item.description: An AI Gateway, registry, and proxy that sits in front of any MCP, A2A, or REST/gRPC APIs, exposing a unified endpoint with centralized discovery, guardrails and management. Optimizes Agent & Tool calling, and supports plugins.

item.title: agentgateway/agentgateway — momentum 74
item.description: Next Generation Agentic Proxy for AI Agents and MCP servers

item.title: Portkey-AI/gateway — momentum 72
item.description: A blazing fast AI Gateway with integrated guardrails. Route to 1,600+ LLMs, 50+ AI Guardrails with 1 fast & friendly API.

item.title: krakend/krakend-ce — momentum 72
item.description: KrakenD Community Edition: High-performance, stateless, declarative, API Gateway written in Go.

item.title: workweave/router — momentum 71
item.description: Model router for agentic systems. Routes every prompt to the right model in <50ms. Cut costs 40-70% with just an endpoint change.

item.title: harrrshall/tinyrouter — momentum 71
item.description: A tiny ~10K-parameter LLM router that learns which open-source model (deepseek-v4-pro / glm-5p2 / kimi-k2p6 via Fireworks) should answer each question and in what role, trained by evolution (sep-CMA-ES).

item.title: lidge-jun/opencodex — momentum 71
item.description: Universal provider proxy for OpenAI Codex — use any LLM with Codex CLI, App, and SDK

item.title: romgX/openrelay — momentum 70
item.description: 几百个免费 AI 模型配额，一键接入本地项目。| Hundreds of free AI model quotas, one-click access to local projects.

item.title: envoyproxy/ai-gateway — momentum 70
item.description: Manages Unified Access to Generative AI Services built on Envoy Gateway

item.title: LiteLLM-Labs/litellm-agent-control-plane — momentum 70
item.description: 1 place to call all your agents - OpenCode, Hermes, Claude Managed Agents, Cursor Agents API, DeepAgents.

item.title: mithun50/openclaw-termux — momentum 69
item.description: Run OpenClaw AI Gateway on Android — standalone Flutter app with built-in terminal, web dashboard, and one-tap setup. Also available as a Termux CLI package.

item.title: theopenco/llmgateway — momentum 69
item.description: Route, manage, and analyze your LLM requests across multiple providers with a unified API interface.
